zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Greinville於1236年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾哈拉阿頓時，她的父親Gilbert de Grenville22歲，母親Joyouse Prested21歲。她於1259年與John Engaine在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1305年11月2日在英國英格蘭艾可哈爾斯亞德享年69歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾格林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Greinville于1236年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾哈拉阿頓时，她的父亲Gilbert de Grenville22岁，母亲Joyouse Prested21岁。她于1259年与John Engaine在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1305年11月2日在英国英格兰艾可哈爾斯亞德享年69岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾格林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Greinville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Greinville was born in 1236, in Hallaton, Leicestershire, England, her father, Gilbert de Grenville, was 22 and her mother, Joyouse Prested, was 21. She married John Engaine in 1259, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 November 1305, in Halstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Greenfield, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Greinville est née en 1236, à Hallaton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Grenville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joyouse Prested, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Engaine en 1259, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 novembre 1305, à Halstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Greenfield, Lancashire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Greinville è nata il nel 1236 nel Hallaton, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Gilbert de Grenville, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Joyouse Prested, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Engaine nel 1259, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 novembre 1305, nel Halstead, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Greenfield, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Greinvilleが1236年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハラトンで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Grenvilleは22歳，母Joyouse Prestedは21歳であった。1259年にイギリスエセックスでJohn Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1305年11月2日にイギリスイギリスエセックスハルステアドで69歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアグレエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Greinville(이)가 1236년 영국 레이스스터실르 핼라턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Grenville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyouse Prested(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 에세스에서 John Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 11월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 할스테아드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 그린필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Greinville nasceu em 1236, em Hallaton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Grenville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joyouse Prested, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Engaine em 1259, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1305, em Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Greenfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Greinville родилась в 1236 г. в местности холлатон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Grenville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joyouse Prested, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Engaine в 1259 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 ноября 1305 г. в местности холстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности гринфиелд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Greinville nació en 1236, en Hallaton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Grenville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joyouse Prested, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Engaine en 1259, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1305, en Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Greenfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
